name: spaitial-ai
description: SpAItial plugins for Claude — generate, edit, manage, and export explorable 3D Gaussian-splat worlds via the hosted SpAItial MCP server.

plugins.name: spaitial-ai
plugins.description: Generate and edit explorable 3D Gaussian-splat worlds from a text prompt, image, 360 panorama, or iterative pano edit using the SpAItial MCP server — then download splats, export meshes, manage your library, and preview them via hosted viewer links.
